Beams helps me a lot to keep track of my tasks of the day, to join meetings faster and is always reminding me how much time I have left for a specific task/meeting.

Beams has taken what their competitors failed at. They are creating an incredibly useful tool, but more importantly, they are listening to their users and not filling the product with unwanted bloat. Their UI is also minimal and focused without taking over the display, and it just works. Beams is a must-have for productivity! [...] Report

 104 views

•1 review

Beams is a real game changer for my daily work. I have lots of remote meetings every day, taking place on Zoom and Google Meet. Beams helps me to have upcoming events in mind without switching to my calendar, it reminds me a minute before it starts and lets me join with just one click. I really don't want to miss beams any more.

I've been using Beams for 3 months and I love it. I use it every day to keep an overview of my day, quickly see whats next, jump in to the next Zoom meetings and while in the meeting to - at a glance - see when it is done. Simple and effective!

results.title: Corexta Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
•1 review

Corexta has revolutionized the way our agency operates. With its all-in-one business management platform, we've experienced seamless collaboration, simplified operations, and real results. The user-friendly interface makes it easy for our team to work together in real-time, ensuring projects move forward smoothly. The comprehensive control it offers, from client management to employee attendance, covers every aspect of agency management, allowing us to focus on growth. With customizable roles and permissions, Corexta adapts to our evolving needs as we scale. Its powerful features, including task tracking, time management, finance management, and more, are tailored to meet our unique requirements. Overall, Corexta has become an indispensable tool for our agency's success. [...] Report

 6 views

•1 review

My experience with Corexta has been nothing short of excellent. As an agency owner, I rely on Corexta to manage every aspect of my business – from client relations to project management to financial tracking. The platform's user-friendly interface and robust features make it easy to stay organized and productive, while its responsive customer support team is always there to assist with any questions or concerns. I highly recommend Corexta to any agency looking to streamline their operations and achieve greater success.

results.content:

• Reliable and Secure Payments

#### What's great

#### What needs improvement

#### What needs improvement

DAVID 10X
Peter Rakas
Desi Septiana [...] Pageify
Jack
Nolan Vu

#### What's great

Shopify is one of those tools where you understand the hype the moment you actually use it. I set up a working store with products, checkout, and shipping in under 3 hours, and I'm not a developer. The theme editor is intuitive, the mobile preview works perfectly, and the fact that every plan comes with unlimited products and bandwidth means you're not constantly worrying about hitting limits as you grow. Shop Pay checkout is insanely smooth for customers too, our cart abandonment dropped noticeably after switching from a custom WooCommerce setup. [...] The 2% surcharge on Basic feels like a penalty for not using Shopify Payments, which isn't even available in every country. And the new policy charging transaction fees on store credit and gift cards for stores created after May 2025 feels like nickel-and-diming loyal merchants. Shopify should be making its platform stickier through value, not through fee structures that punish flexibility

Clipse Tseng

#### What's great

I have successfully launched and maintained five online stores using Shopify. The platform streamlines the store launch process, ensuring reliable performance.

#### What needs improvement

The community is relatively quiet, and the theme versions receive frequent updates.

#### vs Alternatives

• Easy to Use

• Highly Customizable

• Extensive App Ecosystem
